overview.introduction: Adopt clean code standards using formatting formatting helpers, strict module validation checks, and lock file tracking.
overview.why_it_matters: Understanding Best Practices allows developers to scale cloud deployments safely and predictably.
overview.industry_usage: Used by DevOps engineers worldwide to standardize resource management pipelines.
overview.what_you_will_build: An isolated workspace containing HCL files and running Terraform CLI operations.
overview.prerequisites: Git course and Linux terminal fundamentals.
learning_outcomes: Explain the purpose and mechanics of Best Practices.
Write structured and clean HCL configurations.
Resolve variable parameters, inputs, and outputs dependencies.
Inspect resource state maps using state files.

key_concepts.title: Syntax Standards and Checks
key_concepts.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
key_concepts.explanation: Detailed context regarding Best Practices. Designing and provisioning infrastructure declarations cleanly ensures high availability.

commands.name: terraform
commands.purpose: Execute operations related to Best Practices.
commands.output_explanation: Confirms action step for Best Practices is processed.

key_concepts.pro_tip: Keep configurations DRY by dividing infrastructure components into clean directories and modules.
key_concepts.best_practices: Version control your .tf configurations and never commit secret keys or tfstate files.
key_concepts.common_mistakes: Running apply without running plan first to audit resource state changes.
key_concepts.real_world_usage: Companies spin up test, staging, and production environments in seconds using Terraform.
key_concepts.summary: Best Practices configuration forms the building block of Infrastructure as Code.

interactive_examples.scenario: Configure key parameters in local workspace.

steps.explanation: Ensure you are in the correct home directory.

interactive_examples.solution: Check your commands spacing and verify provider declarations.

lessons.title: 1. Format Terraform config files
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Format Terraform config files is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Execute format command to align your spacing settings inside active files.
lessons.hint: Check the spelling of your files and declarations.

lessons.title: 2. Validate configuration layout
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Validate configuration layout is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Run the validate command to audit formatting/syntax validity.
lessons.hint: Ensure you initialized the directory with init first.

lessons.title: 3. Execute Terraform plan
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Execute Terraform plan is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Perform a plan preview run to inspect resource lifecycle changes.

lessons.title: 4. Execute Terraform apply
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Execute Terraform apply is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Apply configuration settings to synchronize state caches.
lessons.hint: Confirm there are no validation syntax failures.

lessons.title: 5. List current workspace
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding List current workspace is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check the workspace list to confirm isolated paths.

lessons.title: 6. Check current state lists
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Check current state lists is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Retrieve managed resources list from state tracker.
lessons.hint: Make sure you applied the changes first.

lessons.title: 7. Execute Terraform output
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Execute Terraform output is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Verify outputs are declared in configuration files.

lessons.title: 8. Mini Challenge: Format and Validate
lessons.definition: Enforcing linting rules, variable boundaries, and file style standardization metrics.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Mini Challenge: Format and Validate is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Execute formatting alignment commands, and then perform check validation diagnostics.
lessons.hint: Refer to the task guidelines and complete the challenge correctly.

practice_exercises.title: Exercise: Explore Best Practices
practice_exercises.description: Try modifying local parameters and running validate.
